content.en:
The breakthrough of Su Ho was too important for the Sioux people, which greatly enhanced the strength of the Su people, and also gave birth to a top patriarch of the Su people, whose strength was still above Su Yuan.

After some time, Soho stabilized the realm and held a celebration of the senators.

Ye Tian also participated, and also gave a little gift.

......

"Soho, I'm going to resurrect Su Luo, and during this period of time, all the affairs of the Su clan will be handed over to you!" Su Yuan said.

"Ancestor, don't worry!"

Soho replied.

Subsequently.

Su Yuan took the Primordial Realm Flower and began to reverse time and space, resurrecting the Ninefold to the Dao Realm Su Luo.

In an instant, the space-time of the Void Domain prevented Su Yuan from doing so.

Rumble!!!!

The terrifying power acted on Su Yuan's body, even if Su Yuan was a veteran-level existence and his cultivation was extremely terrifying, he was still a little unbearable.

But at this time, the power of the Primordial Realm Flower bloomed, canceling out most of the backlash, but the remaining backlash still made Su Yuan crack all over.

However, Su Luo's body is condensed little by little, and his consciousness is returning.

Ultimately.

Su Luo opened his eyes and was completely resurrected.

This is the resurrection in the truest sense of the word!

"Grandpa!"

As soon as Su Luo came back to life, he saw Su Yuan, who was cracked all over, and immediately understood something.

"Su Luo, don't show your face for the time being, cultivate here with peace of mind, I need to repair my injuries. "

Su Yuan ordered.

"Yes!"

Su Luo replied.

......

What happened to the Sioux tribe, Ye Tian didn't know.

At this time.

Ye Tian was using the various materials he had collected to cultivate the Dragon Scale Legend.

His material collection is almost the same, and it won't be long before he can cultivate the Dragon Scale Legendary Body to the Xiaocheng realm, and then his strength will skyrocket again.

Time flies.

The years of the 100,000 solstice era have passed.

this day.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's dragon scale legend body finally advanced to the realm of Xiaocheng, his body became more powerful, and his aura became more terrifying.

"Legend to the middle of the Dao realm cultivation, the dragon scale legend body is small to become the realm, and I have also comprehended the second sequence of supreme dao rules, with my strength is enough to kill the ordinary legendary to the dao realm, enough to match the top legendary dao realm, and it is also the top legendary realm that takes the road of the strongest to the dao. If it is an ordinary path, even if I cultivate to reach the peak of the Legendary Dao Realm, and the top-level Legendary Body is perfect, I am not my opponent. Ye Tian muttered.

With his current strength, as long as he didn't encounter a patriarch-level or a Demon Venerable-level powerhouse on the side of the Supreme Dao Void Demon, as well as a few demonic legends of the Dao Realm or the Supreme Dao Void Demon, he would not be in any danger.

The years passed.

The primordial dragon liquid that Ye Tian had obtained was gradually running out, but his cultivation still did not reach the late stage of the Legendary Dao Realm in the end.

And the primordial dust gold he obtained was gradually exhausted, leaving only one piece.

This piece is a high-quality primordial dust gold, which is very valuable, if it is given to a top-notch legend to the Dao realm, it should allow the other party to comprehend the rules of the second sequence of the Dao.

However, Ye Tian has no plans to trade, and he will leave it to his son Ye Xingchen.

After all, such good things are really accessible.

It is he who can be found in the primordial void.

this day.

The raw dust is completely depleted.

"The second sequence has reached the realm of Dao rules, and it is impossible to progress in a short period of time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But with such an improvement, he is already very satisfied.

The years that followed.

Ye Tian contacted one elder after another and used the Primordial Realm Flower he found to trade the Dragon Scale Ancient Stone with them.

These patriarchs are very wealthy, and there are naturally a lot of dragon scale ancient stones.

Gradually, Ye Tian obtained a large number of dragon scale ancient stones, and other materials were also gathered one by one.

Subsequently.

He used these materials to improve his dragon scale legend body.

The dragon scale legend body that had originally reached the Xiaocheng realm gradually improved towards the Dacheng realm.

After a long time.

The Legend of the Dragon Scale has been completed!

"The strength has skyrocketed!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

However, except for the few remaining plants of his Primordial Realm Flowers, all the others were traded, and there was no point in trading these plants again.

After all, it was too difficult for the Dragon Scale Legendary Body to go from the Dacheng Realm to the Consummation Realm, and ten times more Primordial Realm Flowers might not be enough.

So, he didn't continue trading.

......

The Supreme Void.

this day.

A group of elders talked about the legendary ruins, and Ye Tian also joined the discussion.

"Everyone, the legend of the ancient ruins is about to open, do you want to go in?"

The Ancient Emperor of Longyan asked.

"Legendary ruins, I won't go in, I almost fell last time, but I was unlucky, and I only got an ordinary blood of legend. "

"I've got to give it a try, one of my descendants still lacks a piece of top-level legendary blood, he has no hope of getting it, only I have to fight for it. Once found, come out immediately. Moreover, my means of preserving my life are also good, unless I am very unlucky, I will not fall. "

"Go ahead, I'm not going, the legendary ruins don't have anything good except for legendary-level creatures, and I don't need the blood of legends!"

Ye Tian listened to their opponents, and also knew about the situation of the legendary ancient ruins.

The Legendary Ruins are places similar to the Legends Realm, where some legendary creatures have been born.

However, the legend of the ancient ruins does not restrict cultivation, and it is said that you can enter it to the Dao realm, and only the existence of the patriarchal level cannot enter.

It is difficult to collect the blood of legends in the legendary world, and it is difficult to collect a copy for a long time, but the ancient ruins of legends are easy to collect.

Like many legends, the legendary blood used to break through to the Dao realm is actually not from the legendary realm, but from the legendary ancient ruins.

Of course.

It is said that the ruins will only be opened once in a long time, and the number of legendary creatures is not large, and the competition is fierce, and those legendary blood is simply not enough.

"Is there a powerful legendary-level creature in the Legendary Ruins?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" the Longyan Ancient Emperor nodded, "Last time, there were a total of five supreme legendary-level creatures in the legendary ruins, but three were snatched by the Supreme Dao Void Demon side, and only two were snatched by our side. "

There are supreme legendary-level creatures, and Ye Tian is very interested.

He also wants to kill more powerful legendary creatures, even if he can't use them in the future, he can sell them!

However, the Ancient Emperor of Longyan said: "Ye Tian, the legendary-level creatures of the legendary ruins are not the same as the legendary-level creatures of the Legends Realm, the legendary-level creatures of the Legends Realm are restricted by the Legends Realm, their cultivation is difficult to improve, and their strength is fixed at a certain level. However, the legendary creatures of the legendary ruins can be cultivated and improved, and their strength is very strong, which is not comparable to the legendary creatures in the legendary world. So, it's not very easy to kill a legendary creature in the Legendary Ruins, but it's certainly easier than killing a legendary creature in the Legendary Realm. "
